overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves from a narrow concrete alley with construction cranes into open parking areas and onto palm-lined roads approaching a massive industrial complex with satellite dishes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow concrete alley between industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow passage between tall concrete industrial structures

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete structure with small red lights
yellow industrial cranes silhouetted against the sky
tall futuristic industrial complex with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed alley between dark concrete industrial buildings. Construction cranes are visible overhead against a clear blue sky. The camera moves forward past concrete pillars toward an opening into a wider area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial parking lot with scattered vehicles

events.description: exits narrow alley into open industrial parking plaza

agents.ego_description: moving through open parking area past abandoned and parked vehicles

entered.detail: abandoned vehicles including a yellow car and silver sedan
tall palm trees lining the edge of the plaza
rectangular concrete planter with small palm trees

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit parking lot with scattered abandoned cars. The industrial towers loom larger in the distance as the camera moves forward. Palm trees are visible on the right edge of the plaza, and the camera navigates between parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road with green warehouse building

events.description: turns right onto main road passing green industrial building

agents.ego_description: navigating right turn onto paved road with lane markings and barriers

entered.detail: large green and beige industrial warehouse with horizontal windows
orange and white striped concrete barriers
large spherical satellite dishes on industrial towers

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a paved industrial road, revealing a large green warehouse building on the right. Road barriers line the edge of the pavement. Large spherical satellite dishes become visible on the distant industrial towers as the camera aligns with the main thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: main industrial avenue approaching satellite array

events.description: graffiti-covered wall becomes visible on right side of road

agents.ego_description: proceeding down main road toward industrial complex with satellite dishes

notable_agents.action: black car driving in opposite direction on the left side of road

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in red and white graffiti tags
massive spherical tanks and satellite dishes on industrial towers

segments.scene_description: The final segment proceeds down the main industrial avenue with palm trees lining the left side. A graffiti-covered wall runs along the right. The spherical satellite dishes and industrial towers grow larger ahead as the camera approaches the complex. Sparse vehicle traffic passes by on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined industrial alleyway into a sprawling, sun-drenched complex dominated by massive satellite dishes. It begins by moving forward through a narrow corridor of dark concrete buildings under the shadow of overhead construction cranes, eventually breaking through the enclosure into a wide, sunlit parking lot. As the camera navigates between abandoned cars and passes palm trees, the view expands to reveal looming industrial towers in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right onto a paved road lined with barriers and a large green warehouse, aligning itself with a main thoroughfare. Finally, the movement proceeds down a palm-lined avenue past a graffiti-covered wall, with the spherical satellite dishes growing larger as the camera approaches the heart of the industrial complex.
